zh.lifeSummary: 當Marquise de Craon於1149年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧時，她的父親Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon49歲，母親Isabelle de Vitre49歲。她於1162年與Guillaume II de la Guerche結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1170年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 蓋-德-布利塔尼享年21歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marquise de Craon于1149年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧时，她的父亲Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon49岁，母亲Isabelle de Vitre49岁。她于1162年与Guillaume II de la Guerche结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1170年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 蓋-德-布利塔尼享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Craine
meanings: Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac (Giolla) Ciaráin ‘son of (the devotee of) Ciarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of Gaelic ciar, Manx keeir ‘black’. The place Ballacraine on the Isle of Man means ‘Craine's farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Marquise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: taken from the vocabulary word denoting the rank of nobility ( compare Earl , Prince , King ). This derives from Old French marchis, i.e. ‘lord of the marches (border districts)’. The spelling was later influenced by the Provençal and Spanish equivalents. Use as a given name may also have been influenced by the Scottish surname McMarquis, Gaelic Mac Marcuis, a patronymic from Marcus .

en.lifeSummary: When Marquise de Craon was born in 1149, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, was 49 and her mother, Isabelle de Vitre, was 49. She married Guillaume II de la Guerche in 1162. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1170, in La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marquise de Craon est née en 1149, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Vitre, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume II de la Guerche en 1162. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1170, à La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marquise de Craon 1149 in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon 49 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Vitre 49. Sie hat 1162 Guillaume II de la Guerche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1170 im Alter von 21 Jahren in La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

ko.lifeSummary: Marquise de Craon(이)가 1149년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Vitre(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1162년 Guillaume II de la Guerche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 라 게르체-데-브레타그니에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Guillaume II de la Guerche em 1162. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1170, em La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 21 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marquise de Craon родилась в 1149 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Vitre, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume II de la Guerche в 1162 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1170 г. в местности ла гуирче-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 21 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marquise de Craon nació en 1149, en Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Vitre, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Guillaume II de la Guerche en 1162. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1170, en La Guerche-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 21 años.
